description_long: This modern two-story house features a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The front includes a covered carport for two vehicles, a recessed entryway with a wooden door, and a small landscaped area. The rear of the house opens to a private patio with outdoor seating and a barbecue area, surrounded by low walls for privacy. Large windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, with landscaped strips and paved walkways visible around the house.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a covered carport, and private outdoor spaces, finished in light gray and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered carport, main entryway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid perimeter wall, minimal windows, and landscaped strips.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio, outdoor seating, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long, windowed facade and additional landscaping along the wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a wooden door, covered porch, steps, and minimalistic landscaping
